hidden_defects.condition: stale audited_current_evidence_snapshot data could demote portfolio and position values while source_artifacts still displayed the current-evidence source as PASS
hidden_defects.impact: operator source evidence display could disagree with the fail-closed portfolio truth surface
hidden_defects.fix: source_artifacts now applies generated_at_utc freshness to audited current-evidence snapshots
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: stale audited evidence remains unusable for live readiness, live orders, or scale-up
